prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins on a plain white background. A small gold Dove bird logo appears above centered text reading: “Did you know that Dove Bar washes away germs?”

The scene then cuts to a white plate with a dark navy rim. In the center of the plate is a pale circular area covered with many small dark specks, visually suggesting particles or “germs.”

Next, a hand uses a dark blue Dove-shaped implement or soap-like object against a white bar in a shallow glass dish on a white plate. On-screen text at the bottom reads: “With Dove…”

The commercial returns to the plate with the navy rim, again showing the pale center with scattered dark specks.

A white, creamy-looking stream or ribbon appears against a white background. Text at the bottom reads: “Made with ¼ moisturizing cream.”

The setting changes to a bathroom sink. A person wearing a light blue robe washes their hands with a white bar of soap under running water. The faucet and sink are visible, and the person’s hands are covered with lather.

The next shot shows a woman with red hair tied up, wearing the same light blue robe, looking into a bathroom mirror. She touches her chin with one finger, suggesting she is checking or feeling her skin.

The final product shot appears on a white background. A white Dove beauty bar with the Dove bird shape embossed on it sits above or in front of a Dove product box. To the right, text reads: “Cleans Effectively, Cares Beautifully.” A gold circular seal with a large “1” is shown below the text. In the last frame, a small Unilever logo appears near the upper right.
